title: Lovely Pink Hanging Paper Tissue Pompom (40cm) 1 Piece - Vibrant Solid Color Party Decoration for Birthdays, Weddings, Baby Showers, and Events
features: VIBRANT LOVELY PINK DESIGN: Add a pop of color to your party with our 40cm lovely pink hanging paper tissue pompom, perfect for brightening up any celebration, be it birthdays, weddings, baby showers or other events.
EASY-TO-ASSEMBLE DECORATION: Have your stylish party decorations up in no time with our simple hanging mechanism, allowing you to focus on the fun and festivities without stress.
QUALITY & QUANTITY: Made from premium paper tissue material, this 1-piece pompom ensures a durable and long-lasting decoration that can handle all your festivities.

PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Elevate your events with our eye-catching solid color party decoration ranging from intimate gatherings to large-scale celebrations like birthdays, baby showers, weddings, and more.

MAXIMIZE YOUR PARTY DECOR IMPACT: Mix and match with our other party decorations to create a stunning display that will leave your guests in awe. Achieve that perfectly coordinated look for a memorable and visually impressive event.
description: Product Description Transform your party room into a sensational celebration venue with this eye-catching Baby Pink Tissue Paper Pom Pom. Made of delicate tissue paper, this delightful hanging decoration is lightweight and can be hung easily from the ceiling or a doorway to bring style to any special occasion. Create a dazzling horizon over the entire celebration by hanging this tissue paper pom pom with matching honeycomb paper balls, decorative fans and streamers at varying lengths from the ceiling throughout the venue. Manufacturer's Description Transform your party room into a delightful celebration space with our Baby Pink Tissue Paper Pom Pom. Place a single Baby Pink Hanging Pom Pom Decoration above your party table for a fun pop of colour. Hang multiple paper pom poms to match your party's colour scheme and create a dynamic floating ceiling effect. This Baby Pink Paper Pom Pom is ideal for your baby shower, girl's birthday party, christening and other special occasions. Coordinate with other Baby Pink party supplies and party decorations for a truly charming impression. This Baby Pink Tissue Paper Pom Pom measures 40cm (16") and is sold individually.
